soulprintSearchHint: paths: os.* / kernel.* / cpu.* / memory.* / network.* — ops: = != >= <= ~ ; wildcard *
emptySoulprintFilter: Nothing matched the soulprint filter (or the hosts have no matching facts).
emptyNoSoulsPrefix: No Souls match the filter. They are registered via
createSidHint: FQDN of the host — unique Soul identifier (docs/soul/identity.md).
createSidError: Invalid SID: lowercase letters/digits, dots, hyphens; must start with a letter or digit.
createTransportAgentHint: agent — Soul daemon connects via mTLS gRPC stream. A bootstrap token is issued.
createTransportSshHint: ssh — Keeper delivers configuration over SSH without an agent. No token is issued.
createTokenWarn: Token is shown ONCE. Copy it now and deliver to the host securely. TTL until: {{expires}}
createOnboardingHint: Run soul with this token → CSR → mTLS SoulSeed → status pending→connected.
createSshRegistered: SSH Soul registered with status pending. Configuration is delivered via keeper.push.
createErrorConflict: A Soul with this SID already exists.
historyUnavailableSuffix: returned {{status}} (old Keeper or not yet exposed).
soulprintNotReceived: Soulprint not received from Soul yet (410). Possible causes: just onboarded, or
skewWarning: skew {{minutes}} min (collected_at vs received_at; > 10 min — possible NTP drift)
tokenIssuedWarn: The token is shown ONCE. Copy it now — it cannot be shown again, only re-issued via force.
issueTokenIntro: Re-issue a bootstrap token for the Soul (transport: agent). The plain token is shown once. There is no separate revoke endpoint in the API — to revoke the active token, issue a new one with
ttlHint: This parameter is not yet sent to the API — Keeper uses the server default. Field reserved for a future endpoint extension.
forceHint: — expire the active token and issue a new one
forceWarn: Without force, with an active token Keeper returns 409 bootstrap-token-active.
covenPartialWarn: partial — some chunks were committed before the failure. Retry the operation (idempotent).
bulkCovenIntro: Will be applied to {{count}} Souls. Selector — explicit SID list.
singleCovenIntro: The current set of Coven labels is pre-filled. Remove / add, pick a mode and apply.
zodReplaceLabelsRequired: for replace provide a set of labels (may be empty)
zodAppendRemoveLabel: for append/remove a single label is required
bulkTraitIntro: Will be applied to {{count}} Souls. Selector — explicit SID list.
singleTraitIntro: Merge/replace/remove trait labels on this host.
traitValueHint: Value: string or JSON list of scalars. Key: kebab-case.
traitRemoveKeysHint: kebab-case names separated by commas: namespace, tier
traitKeysRequired: Specify at least one key to remove.
traitKeyInvalid: Key must be kebab-case (lowercase, digits, hyphen).
traitPartialWarn: partial — some chunks were committed before the failure. Retry the operation (idempotent).
